pricing: ynETHx shares are converted to WETH via ERC-4626 convertToAssets(1e8), then divided by Morpho's wstETH/stETH exchange-rate adapter and scaled to 1e36.
notes: Base value depends on ynETHx vault accounting; ynETHx is an EIP-1967 proxy, so accounting logic can change. Quote leg is Morpho's deterministic wstETH/stETH adapter; latestRoundData returns zero timestamps, so there is no heartbeat freshness signal. MorphoChainlinkOracleV2 itself is immutable.
